programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis probe the murder of a popular Harlem community leader; McCoy and Carmichael struggle to prevent a chaotic situation.

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate a possible homicide while probing the assault of a retired divorce attorney.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate the murder of a police officer who was shot while on an undercover stakeout.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives link the shooting of an investigative reporter to a sensationalized murder case, closed 20 years earlier.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: Nick and Sally don't understand why one toy car goes faster than another.

programme.title: Tim McGraw & Faith Hill: Country Lovin'
programme.desc: They met by chance but, alas, it was bad timing. He proposed in a trailer dressing room. She responded with lipstick kisses on a mirror. A blending of music and marriage that defies time. Soul 2 Soul. The best goes on…….

programme.title: Tina Turner: Simply the Best
programme.desc: The odds were against her. Learn how singer Tina Turner reached super-stardom with her high energy and gravelly voice and prevailed as the "Queen of Rock 'n' Roll". Learn how Tina prevailed then reached solo superstardom with songs like "Private Dancer".

programme.title: Tom Petty: Won't Back Down
programme.desc: Tom Petty is recognized as one of rock's greatest singer-songwriters.

programme.title: U2: Rockumentary
programme.desc: A cliche start: 4 teenage boys form a rock band in the drummer's kitchen. 45 years, 14 albums, 24 concert tours, 22 Grammies. U2 raises millions to fight hunger, disease and poverty. Music transcends melody. It means mission.

programme.title: Willie Nelson: Highs and Lows
programme.desc: An emerging counter-culture connects with Willie's unorthodox ways; the Outlaw Movement.

programme.title: AC/DC: Dirty Deeds
programme.desc: AC/DC's incredible career has spanned almost 4 decades, with over 200 million records sold worldwide to date and consistently sold old concerts they are one of the highest grossing bands of all time.

programme.title: Amy Winehouse: A Final Goodbye (2011)
programme.desc: A Final Goodbye is an intimate look into the life and times of Amy Winehouse. This in-depth program chronicles her rise to pop superstardom and also offers a sensitive portrayal of a transformative star and the inner demons that inspired her work.

programme.title: Bieber Generation
programme.desc: This documentary film attempts to analyze the dynamics of a massive fan-base; it focuses on the Beliebers (fans of Justin Bieber).

programme.title: Devo — The Complete Truth About De-evolution
programme.desc: Night Flight Presents: Devo; the seminal concept band; made a career out of setting to music video their dada-gone-camp theory of De-Evolution and its rebuke of corporate culture.

programme.title: Hamilton: One Shot To Broadway
programme.desc: The story of the hit musical that changed Broadway forever and brought the genius of Lin Manuel Miranda to the attention of legions of fans across the world. Featuring interviews with Miranda, as well as the cast and crew of Hamilton.

programme.title: Human Rights Concerts: An Embrace of Hope
programme.desc: The An Embrace Of Hope concert was a de facto post-script to the Human Rights Now! tour. It took place in Chile - a country that for political reasons it was not possible for the Human Rights Now! tour to visit during the 1988 world tour.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta
programme.desc: Karlie opens up to her daughter, Jasmine, about her tumultuous past. Erica and Safaree work toward resolution. Rasheeda confronts her sister. Yandy doesn't feel at home in her own house, leading her and Mendeecees to tell Infinity it's time to move out.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: Los demonios bailan en la villa

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: Efectos instantáneos
programme.desc: Yess se dio tragos hasta encontrar el más amargo. Los bandos tratan de encontrar la paz, pero solo tratan. Isaac ya no puede forzar la máquina y termina a Leslie. Unas pócimas mágicas llenas de alcohol hacen efecto inmediato en los influencers.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: ¡Que viva la toxicidad!
programme.desc: Lizbeth y Ali dan los votos a su amor tóxico, mientras que los salvados dan sus votos a la soltería. La Love Suite se abre por última vez con un trío muy caliente.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: An arsonist is about to torch Matlock’s favorite men’s store and one of the owners will become Matlock’s next case after his partner is murdered.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Katie Clark, the new assistant D.A. in town, is trying to juggle the demands of being a single parent and perform a stellar job on her first prosecution case. But, to her horror, she learns that the suspect she’s trying to convict is her former lover.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: While attending a UCLA Law seminar, Matlock and Michelle end up in a dangerous dilemma. After giving Matlock inside information regarding an upcoming hit his former law school classmate is involved in a fatal hit and run.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Director of an amateur stage production, Doug Michaels fires would-be actor Ben Matlock from his role as a detective, claiming he’s seen kumquats with more talent. However, the tables soon turn when Michaels is accused of murdering the leading lady.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: When Matlock is slapped by an attractive older woman in a restaurant, Ben recalls to Julie the story of his first case – the murder of the man who put him through law school.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock serves double duty: defending Brian Emerson, who’s charged with killing his ex-wife, and babysitting Emerson’s 6-year-old daughter.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A vacation to a wild west ghost town becomes more than Matlock bargained for as a bump on the head takes him straight back in time to the real old wild west, surrounded by familiar faces – with very unfamiliar occupations.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock’s on jury duty, and the case against a man-about-town who stands to gain a fortune from his wife’s death seems airtight. Close examination of the evidence suggests otherwise to Ben.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: A budding friendship between two great lawyers blossoms into animosity when Matlock and District Attorney Brennen square off on a murder trial. Not only does Matlock believe in his client’s innocence, he thinks Brennen might be the one who’s guilty!

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: After witnessing a violent argument between his parents, a distraught young man murders his abusive father.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Legendary Milton Berle guest stars as Harvey Chase, an old-time comedian who calls upon his fan and friend Ben Matlock when he’s accused of murdering a popular, but foul-mouthed performer who’d been called in to replace him.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock comes to the defense of popular game show host Dennis Blake who’s accused of the murder of his successful, yet despised mega-millionaire producer.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock believes in the innocence of a man whose brainwashed son insists he saw his father kill the leader of his cult. Ben is the only hope left for a concerned father whose son, David, has been swept into a religious cult.

programme.title: Matlock (1986)
programme.desc: Matlock treads on unfamiliar turf when he spearheads an investigation to defend a popular wrestler, known as The Annihilator when he is accused of killing Sailor Jack, his nemesis in the ring.

programme.desc: The gruesome discovery of a farmer's eviscerated body in an ancient stone circle is made just days before the spring equinox.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.desc: Fredrik reunites with a former client in the Williamsburg neighborhood; Luis hopes to repair his rocky relationship with a rebellious co-lister; Ryan tackles an enormous townhouse that may be too big for most New Yorkers.

programme.desc: A telephone call breathes new life into a development project, but it comes with a catch Fredrik never saw coming; Ryan bends over backward for a potential buyer but receives nothing in return; Luis gets first dibs on a hot new Tribeca building.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After a loyal horse and his recently-returned master are assaulted by thugs, Luffy is drawn into a Davy Back Fight with the Foxy Pirates. The Straw Hat captain never backs down from a challenge, but this contest could cost him his crew!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Davy Back Fight begins with a treacherous Donut Race around Ling Ring Long Land! The Straw Hats square off against the Foxy Pirates in a battle to see who loses a crew member!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami uses her considerable skill as a navigator to put the Straw Hats on the verge of victory, but the captain of the Foxy Pirates has more than a few dirty tricks up his sleeve!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Thanks to some foxy sabotage, Chopper has been lost to the enemy. The only hope for getting him back lies with Zoro and Sanji, but can they learn to work together in time to save the little reindeer?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji and Zoro take a beating at the hands of the Groggy Monsters, but they won’t give up the fight. With a little luck – and some teamwork – they’ll emerge victorious from round two of the Davy Back Fight!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Round three of the Davy Back Fight is a rip roaring roller derby! Chopper’s fate still hangs in the balance, and the Straw Hats have a huge problem: Luffy doesn’t know how to skate!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the Davy Back Fight sprints toward a sensational finish, the Straw Hats find themselves on the brink of defeat! Luffy’s finally managed to stay on his skates, but the Foxy Pirates are notorious cheaters!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats somehow manage to defeat the Foxy Pirates and win back Chopper, but Luffy eagerly accepts the challenge of a rematch! What is the captain thinking? And will his crew mutiny?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A devious game of dodge ball costs the Straw Hats their archaeologist. Now, they’ll have to win an unusual uphill race to reclaim Robin and avoid losing another crew member!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin and Chopper have both been lost to the Foxy Pirates, and there’s only one match remaining in the Davy Back Fight! Luffy’s got a plan to get his mates back, but failure would mean the end of the Straw Hats forever!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Captain Foxy go toe-to-toe in a brutal battle waged aboard a booby-trapped boat. Luffy is fighting for his crew, but Captain Foxy’s dirty tricks have him on the ropes!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy’s epic battle with Captain Foxy reaches its riveting end, and a very old man with a very tall horse reunites with a face from very long ago.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When Luffy and his mates lose their memory, Robin is the only Straw Hat who can remember their adventures together. Can she recover their recollections before the crew splits up?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin tries to hold the crew together while unraveling the mystery of the missing memories. Meanwhile, Nami and Zoro flashback to painful moments from their pasts.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats finally discover the culprit behind their memory loss, but they’ve got bigger problems. The mysterious thief is determined to pit Zoro and Luffy against each other!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro and Luffy fight to the death, Nami attempts to orchestrate an uprising, and Sanji discovers he’s willing to kick a kid in order to get his memories back!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats finally regain their memories, but a much larger challenge looms on the horizon. The mysterious thief is about to transform into something even more powerful!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A terrible storm leads to another run in with the devious Captain Foxy! When Luffy makes the dangerous decision to help his old foe, it could spell disaster for the Straw Hats!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his mates must survive another outrageous battle aboard Captain Foxy’s booby-trapped boat, and even if they survive, something far worse awaits them!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats take time out to help a group of hungry castaways, but trouble looms on the horizon. An icy marine adversary is out to track down Robin!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper and Usopp work feverishly to save Robin from her icy tomb, and Luffy looks to settle the score with Admiral Aokiji in a man-to-man fight to the finish!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An encounter with a giant swimming frog leads to a close call with a seafaring train! Next up for the Straw Hats: drop anchor at a town full of water and seek out a shipwright!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Usopp, and Nami take a wild ride through Water Seven in search of a shipwright. Meanwhile, Chopper and Robin get separated during their quest to find a bookstore!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro is attacked by thugs who want to cash in on his bounty, Sanji gets lost on a grocery shopping expedition, and three suitcases full of cash mysteriously go missing!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A carpenter and his talking pigeon help recover the Straw Hats’ missing money, but the Franky Family won’t give up so easily. Luffy and Nami receive very bad news about their beloved boat!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Nami refuse to believe that the Going Merry’s seaworthy days are finished, but for now, bigger problems loom on the horizon! Their money is missing again, along with Usopp!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp bravely tries to recover the stolen money, but the Franky Family has him badly outnumbered. Zoro, Sanji, and Chopper set out on a rescue mission, but they’ll need Luffy to even the odds!

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Sala de emergencias: Historias inéditas

programme.title: Wardens

programme.title: Wardens

programme.title: Wardens

programme.title: Wardens
programme.desc: This week, game wardens deal with a missing child who was last seen dragged off by a bear... good thing it's only a training excercise. Meanwhile it's opening season for shed antler hunters and the wardens have their hands full!

programme.title: Wardens

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Between the unpredictable hippos and massive man-eating crocodiles of Gabon, Central Africa, Cyril must remain on high alert especially from his small tippy dugout.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: After meeting with a young fisherman who was violently bitten by a monster barracuda, Cyril searches the Florida Keys to find this toothy torpedo, and to learn more about these ferocious hunters.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Cyril has heard disturbing stories of people being accidentally injured and even killed by the huge jumping Gulf Sturgeon - and its even bigger cousin, the White Sturgeon, is the most massive freshwater fish in North America, growing to over 1500 lbs.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: Guyana's jungle in South America is wild and untamed, a remote no-man's land patrolled by jaguars, and where gold diggers still look for a bounty.

programme.title: Chasing Monsters

programme.title: Mountain Men

programme.title: Mountain Men

programme.title: Shipping Wars

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Chris and Robbie transport two pieces of music history owned by "The King" himself. With a load that is slowing him down, Jarrett races against the clock to get to a restaurant opening in time.

programme.title: Shipping Wars
programme.desc: Jennifer tries to get a sensitive parrot to his owner before depression sets in and Roy run gets delayed after his truck breaks down.

programme.title: Shipping Wars

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: Team Salvage risk mechanical disaster and a $20,000 fine, as they roll the dice in order to try and save a beached 7-ton Catamaran from falling apart in a marine sanctuary in the Northern Territory.

programme.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
programme.desc: Team Salvage is trying to re-float a damaged yacht. The owners want to keep it and get it repaired. The squad successfully winches it out only to discover it’s leaking and is full of toxic fumes.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Autographed 1960s Bob Shaw Swing Gate tattoo machine; Terry Ives competition 22hp chainsaw; six-foot chainsaw-carved cedar bear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: A nerdy auction buyer tests Ton and Allen's patience at a big container auction in Ventura. The guys discover a basket and burners for a hot air balloon and a 19th-century German single-shot rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capital City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Nearly all the buyers have it out for each other at an auction in Cedarbrae, ON. Cindy almost comes to blows with Ursula, who takes great pleasure in bidding up Roy, who does his best to give Paul and Bogart the worst advice ever.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Life changes dramatically for nearly all the buyers at an auction in Toronto. Except for Roy, who’s still a jerk.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Cindy and Rick search for fresh lockers at an auction in Toronto. Unforeseen expenses force Ursula to reconsider her attitude about stripping. Roy crashes hard. Paul and Bogart experience the merciless negotiations of Jeff Schwarz: The Liquidator.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: The bachelor party Roy has planned for Bogart is all anyone can talk about. Before the party can begin, Paul and Bogart take care of some adorable business and Rick and Cindy hope to make some money at the track when they meet up with an Olympian.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: The buyers learn lessons at an auction in Ontario. Paul and Bogart discover that listening to each other is useless. Glasses affect Ursula's bidding. Roy learns that his true calling is a frat boy and Rick and Cindy get too much information.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Bogart sets out to make an “extreme locker buying” video at an auction in North Toronto with cameras on his and Paul's heads. Ursula looks even more glamorous, Rick and Cindy get their groom on, and Roy scores a date with Olympian Elizabeth Manley.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: The competition is fierce on Rick’s birthday, a heated battle that sees several buyers finding items custom made to relieve the stress.

programme.desc: The Enterprise crew becomes embroiled in a local power struggle on a tribal planet.

programme.desc: The Enterprise must deal with a creature from Kirk's past that feeds on human blood.

programme.desc: The imminent death of Kira's Cardassian "father" rekindles painful memories of losing her real father.

programme.desc: On a mission for the Klingon Empire, Worf realizes that his friend General Martok is no longer fit to lead.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: At the trial, "Q" continues to denounce humans, while Picard defends his race and convinces "Q" that the upcoming mission at Farpoint will be the perfect opportunity to prove his point.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The crew of the Enterprise is infected with a virus that causes them to behave as though they were intoxicated.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When the leader of an alien culture takes a romantic interest in Lt. Yar, he claims her for his own, to the dismay of his own wife, who, in turn, challenges Tasha in a fight to the death.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise encounters a race known as the Ferengi, a race believed to be more pirates, than traders. But, in the course of the pursuit, all power is lost in the ship, just as the alien ship comes to bear.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise is ordered to undergo a series of tests that will propel the ship at unfathomable speed, but Riker has misgivings surrounding the equations and theories presented by the arrogant designer.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As the Enterprise provides transportation to two delegate parties who are constantly at odds with each other, the ship is invaded by something that jumps from computer terminal to crew members and back again.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After dropping off some colonists in a system nearby, The crew visits a world of beautiful, healthy & tanned human looking people who seem to have a peaceful & loving lifestyle.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After waiting for a response to their hails for three days, Picard finds that the Ferengi have discovered the "Stargazer," an old ship that he once commanded.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise encounters Q again, and he tempts Riker by endowing him with the powers of the Q.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: While on a mission to a planet called Haven, Counselor Troi meets her husband to be, a marriage arranged by her father years before, as the Enterprise encounters a ship far deadlier than any combat could provide.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Captain Picard and some of his crew are caught in a deadly trap in the holodeck as the result of a ship-wide scan from an alien race.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise visits the planet where Data was created and discovers another android like him, but when he's assembled, he's not EXACTLY like him.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riker, Troi, Data and Yar beam down to a planet ruled by a matriarchal government in the hopes of locating a missing freighter crew.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew tries to free the people of the planet Takar from two Ferengi opportunists posing as gods.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Torres is troubled by a series of dreams in which she seems to be reliving another woman's life.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: To save Kes's life, Janeway must test her own spiritual beliefs by undergoing the secret ritual of an alien religious order.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew visits 20th century Los Angeles to prevent a timeship from destroying the Earth's solar system.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew races against time to stop a 20th century computer industrialist from causing a 29th century disaster.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Kes's body is taken over by the mind of a ruthless political leader who's determined to regain control of his planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway is stunned when Q asks her to be the mother of his child.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway, Neelix and the Doctor must retake Voyager from an infestation of microorganisms.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Neelix's efforts to assist the crew wind up involving him in a deadly narcotics ring.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A Holodeck character's obsession with Tuvok threatens to destroy Voyager.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway finds herself trapped in a mysterious time loop, where a series of events repeatedly end in her death.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A Vulcan mating ritual pits Torres against a fellow crewmember, while Chakotay makes a shocking discovery about invaders of a strange planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Chakotay finds a planet of unassimilated Borg drones from all over the galaxy.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: After the Doctor adds a mix of new sub-routines to his program, his personality turns violent.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: After several attacks by the Wraiths, Dr. Elizabeth Weir contemplates if there is a spy among the team, with all signs pointing to Teyla. Feeling betrayed by the team's suspicions, the Athosians move to a newly discovered land.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Sheppard (Joe Flanigan), Dr. Weir (Torri Higginson), and the rest of the team visit a new planet, M7G-677, where no one is older than 24 thanks to a ritual suicide that the citizens believe is keeping the Wraith at bay.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: While on the planet Hoff, Dr. Beckett strives to help the Hoffans who are working on a vaccine against the Wraith. Despite the advice against taking the vaccine due to the threat of violence and high death rate, the Hoffans take the risk.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team visit the Genii, a peaceful farming community, with the goal of trading for food to allow the team to continue to survive. Things take a turn, however when they discover that the Genii are planning a massive attack against the Wraith.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: When a military research base is attacked, a small group of civilians and military personnel escape on a ship into deep space. But divisions emerge between those who want to attempt a return to Earth and those who want to remain aboard the Destiny.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: After secretly contacting Homeworld Command, Dr. Rush (Robert Carlyle) claims that he has been placed in charge by Gen. O’Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) and that there is no hope of returning to Earth. But his assertions are soon questioned.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: With the air supply failing on the Destiny, a team disembarks to a desert-like planet in search of a mineral needed to scrub the ship's air of carbon dioxide. While one team presses on to find the vital mineral, the other has another goal in mind.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: The crew has been working throughout the night to try and determine why the ship’s power reserves are critically low. But when Destiny’s flight path towards a solar system reveals three planets, the entire crew hopes that one of them is habitable.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: On the mysterious planet Argos, the beautiful Kynthia seduces Colonel Jack O'Neill, which means he's condemned to an Argosian lifespan of only a hundred days. As he turns gray, will his team succeed in their frantic search for a cure?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Looking for allies against the Goa'uld, the SG-1 team lands on Cimmeria, home of the legendary Norse gods. Teal'c and O'Neill are transported to an underground labyrinth of caves of the vicious creature Unas. Can Carter & Daniel rescue them?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Dr. Daniel Jackson discovers that in 1945, a young professor slipped through the Stargate, never to return. Together with his still living fiancée, the SG-1 team discovers the now aged professor trapped in a decaying fortress.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: With the proviso that he bring back a Goa'uld larva for study, Teal'c (Christopher Judge) returns to Chulak to stop the Goa'uld from enslaving his son Rya'c. Trouble is, Rya'c needs a larva to survive - and the only one available is Teal'c's.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The SG-1 team returns from the planet Oannes in a panic and minus Daniel Jackson, who was last seen being consumed by a column of flames. But as his comrades mourn him on Earth, Daniel is the captive of an amphibious humanoid creature known as Nem.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The evil Goa'uld Hathor (Suanne Braun) escapes from a Mayan pyramid in Mexico. At the Stargate facility, she uses her charms to seduce the men into helping her take over the world. Can Samantha Carter and her female colleagues defeat her?

programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives - but they are so reliant that they are blind to the immanent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Anytime, anywhere, people disappear – kidnapped from their daily routines. Predators always leave clues behind, but chasing them takes time, hampering investigators' attempts to solve these fatal abductions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Entomology: Bugs have roamed the earth for 250 million years, but their intimate association with death is just now coming to life.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For homicide investigators, it's a race against time as they track their deadliest foe: a serial killer for whom killing is the only way to feel alive.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims – And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder – These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When money is the motive, murder can rip at the very foundation of marriage and family.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: No matter how chaotic or how clean a crime scene appears to be, the culprit is bound to leave something telling behind. Occasionally, it's nothing more than a fingerprint or shoe tread. Sometimes that's all that's needed.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: These cases took a decade or more to solve. There's no statute of limitations on murder. As a case turns cold, the clues become scarce, investigators must rely on science to close cold cases.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some of the best clues come from the least likely places. Baffling crimes have been solved and criminals betrayed through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles, and other seemingly meaningless objects.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When abduction turns to murder, forensic science is the only key to finding justice for the victims of a kidnapper's deadly intentions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes the scales of justice are balanced by just a few milligrams of evidence – a couple of fibers, a tooth filling, or a smudge on a piece of tape. The biggest cases are often solved by the smallest clues.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic psychologists delve into the minds of serial killers, explaining why, most often, they can be a friendly neighbor or the tenacious co-worker – the one who hides his or her dark side better than anyone else.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark befriends singer-banjoist Lafayette Bly, a blind man with an acute sense of hearing and a very strong grip.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A retired lawman's irrational jealousy threatens not only to destroy his marriage but also to make him an easy target for someone who wants him dead.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: No one is more surprised than Micah when newcomer Leota Carraway claims he's her long-lost husband and the father of her child.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is torn by conflicting emotions when he meets the town's new preacher, a former outlaw whom the Rifleman vowed to kill.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The town of North Fork becomes a haven for outlaws when suave Ben Judson smooth-talks his way into the marshal's job.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome gambler moves into town and begins wooing Milly Scott, claiming to have known her deceased brother.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas develops temporary amnesia from a head injury while visiting a strange town and mistakenly assumes the identity of a wanted criminal.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former neighbor of the McCains' is released from jail after serving his sentence for robbery. Lucas lets the man work for him but the new hand holds a secret.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas, Mark, and Micah get lost in Old Mexico, they are held hostage by a group of bandits who intend to kill the men and take Mark as a slave.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While trapped in the ghost town saloon, Lucas tries to come up with a plan to escape with his son and Micah after Mark refuses to leave without him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lou Mallory arrives in North Fork and starts buying up land and businesses. Lou and Lucas start disliking each other after she reveals plans to build a railroad on "worthless" land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a woman arrives in North Fork with symptoms of smallpox, Lucas, Lou Mallory, Doctor Burrage, and hotel occupants are quarantined in the hotel with an outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gunslinger Johnny Drako rides into town and tells the bartender that he is looking for Lucas McCain. After Johnny leaves the saloon, Sweeney hurries to tell Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A man arrives in North Fork, intending to marry Lou Mallory. The hotel owner looks for a way out from marrying the man to whom her dying father promised her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An assassination plot unfolds as four gunmen disguised as cavalrymen enter North Fork. Their target: Sen. Jim Borden. Their weapon: a Gatling gun.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sharpshooter Marty Blair tries to persuade Lucas to buy Mark a rifle. After Lucas shoots a man during a robbery at the hotel, Mark and Lucas disagree with his character.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Fast-draw artist Wade Randall is in town, bragging of his gun battles with notorious bad men until one of them shows up to challenge his story.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas refuses to sell his land, Mr. Prescott will stop at nothing to change his mind. He hires men to try to persuade Lucas, but he refuses.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark's careless actions cause the death of a friend. Unable to accept the truth, he blames the rifle and runs away from home. Soon, he is faced with a tough decision.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Nils Swenson takes the marshal's place for a few days while Micah is away. To maintain peace, Nils insists that anyone coming into town must turn in their weapons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's self-confidence begins to slip away when he misses an easy shot that could have cost Mark his life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A murder occurs at a railroad camp and a young Indian friend of Lucas is accused of the killing. When Lucas tries to help the boy, he finds himself on trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark come upon Winslow Quince, a peddler whose wagon has broken down. They help him bring his wagon to North Fork for repair.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gridley Mau, the son of a man Lucas killed during an attempted robbery, comes to North Fork looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The first railroad train is coming to the new North Fork station. Onboard is a Japanese nobleman and his servant, visiting the West to learn about the United States.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: At Halloween, rustlers take advantage of the seasonal disguises to raid a cattle ranch. Lucas' faith in his son's honesty is shaken when he hears rumors of Mark being mixed up with the thieves.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Lucas run into Micah on the trail and help when the prisoner he is transporting injures his arm. Lucas' life is endangered when a snake crawls into his bed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Alan Richards plans to build a dam in Africa on a tribe's ancestral land. The tribe's witch doctor puts a curse on him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Woodrow, a janitor living in the year 1890, accidentally activates a time traveling helmet which transports him to 1962 - then promptly breaks down.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A hobo, clown, bagpipe player, ballerina and military officer are trapped in a huge cylinder.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A gung-ho young soldier gets a new viewpoint on war when he inexplicably changes places with a Japanese officer trying to stop his superior from leading a charge against American forces.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A lonely old woman refuses to leave her apartment for fear of meeting "Mr. Death."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Paul Radin has invited three people to join him in his bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A vagrant steps into a murdered gangster's expensive shoes and is taken over by the dead man's ghost, who vows to remain on Earth to seek revenge against his killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: On a hunting trip, Hyder Simpson and his dog Rip dive into a lake after a raccoon. When he gets home he finds that no one can see or hear him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Actor Rance McGrew makes TV Westerns for a living, but he's a lousy actor and a worse cowboy. Despite that, each week he "wins" against the bad guys. Finally, the bad guys have had enough and decide to teach McGrew a lesson.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The senior residents of Sunnyvale decide that the secret to youth is acting young, and in particular playing a childhood game called "kick-the-can."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Fortune discovers that a piano he bought his wife for her birthday has magical properties - the music that it plays makes people reveal their true essence.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Jeff Myrtlebank comes back to life at his own funeral and soon begins to act very strangely...

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The Kanamits, 9-foot tall aliens, arrive on Earth with one lofty goal: To Serve Man.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Old Ben, who is able to transform himself into anything, tries to help a crippled little girl.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Awakened by the cries of their daughter Bettina, Chris and Ruth Miller enter her room to find that she has vanished - even though they still hear her crying for help. Chris' physicist friend Bill thinks she moved into another dimension.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: David Gurney wakes up to find that no one - his wife, his co-workers, his best friend, not even his own mother knows him.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An astronaut declares himself a god when his ship lands on a planet populated by people smaller than ants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Oliver Crangle is a bitter, prejudiced man. Through unknown means, he intends to shrink every evil person in the world at four o'clock.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A loud-mouthed braggart's boasts attract the attention of some aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An elderly couple visit the New Life Corporation, hoping to transport their personalities into youthful artificial bodies.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An alien who crash-lands into a remote mountain village stirs up the villagers' fears and animosity, but he befriends a little boy and gives him a mysterious present.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A ventriloquist is convinced that his dummy, Willie, is alive and evil. He makes plans for a new act with a new dummy: plans that Willie doesn't support!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a newlywed couple briefly returns to the groom's childhood home, the ties of the past prove too strong to resist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A widower buys a robot grandmother for his three children.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Cavender, an angel trying to win his wings, tries to help down-on-her-luck Agnes, who has just been fired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An elderly private school teacher wonders if his life has meant anything as he contemplates suicide on Christmas Eve and is reminded by former students that he has, indeed, had an impact on their lives.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A scientist creates an android that has the qualities which he feels he's lacking.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: As Rick and the others continue to acclimate to their new surroundings, they consider a return to normalcy.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The true motives of the Terminans come to light when Rick and the others end up in a vulnerable situation.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick leads a risky mission for a possible small reward when the supplies run low and the group's mistrust of people grows.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the others find themselves pitted against a nasty group but may have a plan to gain the upper hand.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Another group of survivors is introduced, and although things appear safe and nice, there is a bit of a dark side.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group must contend with a new set of issues while out on a mission, and must push through to survive.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Stakes are high when members of the group must go on a heroic rescue mission in a previously known location.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group is spread thin with some members holding down the church and the others on a rescue mission.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: New enemies disregard rules and morals; although Rick wants to find a peaceful agreement, the enemies seem to prefer a more violent resolution.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After facing all the recent trials, a slight detour may offer the solution that the group has been seeking.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group feels beaten after living life on the road, but must continue to trudge along in spite of the changes they have incurred.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After withstanding a spectacular storm, Rick and the others meet what appears to be a friendly person, but find themselves mistrustful.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group has a difficult time molding to a new lifestyle, forcing them to consider whether they can be the people they once were.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: As Rick and the others continue to acclimate to their new surroundings, they consider a return to normalcy.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: While trying to secure a new home, Rick and his group face challenges, and question the utopia they find themselves in.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: When life within the walls begins to mimic life outside, the group realizes that sheltered life may not be possible.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl finds trouble while on a run; Rick and the group feel like outsiders in Alexandria, where trouble approaches the gates.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los integrantes del grupo tienen entrevistas con Deanna, la jefa de Alejandría, y esperan en las casas que les asignan a saber si son aceptados o rechazados. Cuando conocen a los habitantes de la comunidad, perciben que no están bien entrenados.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol y Tyreese llegan a las inmediaciones de Terminus y descubren que sus amigos están retenidos y van a ser sacrificados para ser comidos. Ahora, el destino de todo el grupo depende de ellos dos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de Rick vaga por el bosque y encuentra a Gabriel, un párroco al que salvan de una horda de zombis y les permite pernoctar en su iglesia. Sin embargo, hay algo extraño en él y esa misma noche uno de los integrantes del grupo es secuestrado.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Gareth y su grupo de caníbales atacan la iglesia mientras Rick y sus compañeros están en el bosque buscándolos para vengar a Bob. Además, el padre Gabriel confiesa el siniestro acto de su pasado que no deja descansar a su conciencia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Beth se despierta en un hospital de Atlanta, pero pronto se da cuenta de que los mismos que la auxiliaron y sanaron no la dejarán marchar. No obstante, su nuevo amigo, Noah, y ella tratan de huir del recinto.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras se dirigen hacia el norte, el grupo se ve obligado a detenerse porque una horda de zombis bloquea el camino. La tensión aumenta y la situación termina por estallar cuando Eugene confiesa un secreto que había ocultado a todos hasta ahora.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol y Daryl persiguen a los captores de Beth por una Atlanta devastada, pero su auto se queda sin gasolina y deben pasar la noche en un refugio para mujeres.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Noah regresan a la iglesia para pedirles ayuda a sus compañeros. Rick y otros integrantes del grupo van a Atlanta con la intención de secuestrar a varios policías para intercambiarlos por Beth y Carol.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick busca una salida pacífica al conflicto, pero sus enemigos la rechazan y prefieren zanjar las cosas de forma violenta.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Para cumplir con la promesa que Beth le hizo Noah antes de morir, el grupo se dirige al barrio de Noah, esperando hallar allí protección y a otros supervivientes. Sin embargo, Rick y los suyos no quieren hacerse demasiadas esperanzas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El vehículo se avería y el grupo continúa a pie hacia Washington D. C., pero les sorprende una tormenta y buscan cobijo en un granero, donde encuentran algo totalmente inesperado e inquietante.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aarón invita al grupo a Alejandría, su comunidad, un lugar que, según él, es seguro y amigable. Rick, incapaz de olvidar Woodbury y Terminus, desconfía de Aarón, pero Michonne quiere darle una oportunidad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los integrantes del grupo tienen entrevistas con Deanna, la jefa de Alejandría, y esperan en las casas que les asignan a saber si son aceptados o rechazados. Cuando conocen a los habitantes de la comunidad, perciben que no están bien entrenados.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick, Daryl y Carol se reúnen en secreto para planear cómo recuperar sus armas del arsenal de Alexandria, ya que temen que, si algo sale mal, van a necesitarlas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol le sugiere a Rick que deben asesinar a Pete porque es violento con su esposa e hijo. Por otra parte, Gabriel advierte a Deanna que desconfíe del grupo de Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Deanna y Rick se culpan mutuamente de las muertes de Aidenn y Noah. Rick le ofrece a Jessie protección ante Pete, pero este lo descubre y se enzarza en una pelea con él. La tensión en Alexandria aumenta y algo terrible se avecina.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon are assigned to guard a member of an investment group set up so the surviving member will gain all the assets.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents West and Gordon encounter an old adversary who has found the secret of turning objects into gold.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon are assigned to escort the Sultan of Ramapurand his sacred white elephant, a gift to President Grant.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: The receipt of a newspaper that predicts the death, in their presence, of a famed magician, puzzles agents West and Gordon.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon encounter a society lady who plans to change the U.S.A. into a monarchy and reign as its queen.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon become involved in a bizarre Siberian prisoner exchange in Vladivostok without leaving the United States.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon investigate the murder of a scientist who had been studying a rash of destructive tidal waves.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon Again tangle with pint-sized Dr. Loveless, who has another king-sized plan to achieve world conquest.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon fear an attempt on President Grant's life while they are escorting him to a San Francisco conference.

programme.title: Julio Cesar Chavez vs Ken Sigurani
programme.desc: On June 25th, 1998 Julio Cesar Chavez faced Ken Sigurani at the Foxwoods Resort in Mashantucket resulting in a technical knock out win for Julio Cesar Chavez.

programme.title: Julio Cesar Chavez vs Scott Walker
programme.desc: On February 9th, 1996 Julio Cesar Chavez and Scott Walker faced each other in a 10 round bout at the Cesars Palace Sports Pavilion in Las Vegas that ended in the second round by technical knockout for Julio Cesar Chavez.

programme.title: Kelly Pavlik vs Jermain Taylor 2
programme.desc: On February 16th, 2008 Kelly Pavlik faced Jermain Taylor for a second time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas the 12 round bout resulted in a unanimous decision win for Pavlik.

programme.title: Ken Norton vs Muhammad Ali 1
programme.desc: On March 31st, 1973 Ken Norton faced Muhammad Ali at the Sports Arena in San Diego for North American Boxing Federation Heavyweight titles in this 12 round bout Ali suffered a broken jaw and Norton scored a victory over The Greatest.

programme.title: Keyshawn Davis vs Esteban Sanchez
programme.desc: On April 30th, 2022, Keyshawn Davis fought Esteban Sanchez in a lightweight bout at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. Delivering a sixth round TKO, Davis showed his speed and agility and that he'll have a promising future in the lightweight division.

programme.title: Keyshawn Davis vs Jose Zaragoza
programme.desc: On December 11th, 2021, Keyshawn Davis and Jose Zaragoza fought at Madison Square Garden in New York resulting in Zaragoza going down twice in round two giving the victory to Keyshawn Davis.

programme.title: Keyshawn Davis vs Omar Tienda Bahena
programme.desc: On September 23rd, 2022 Keyshawn Davis fought Omar Tienda Bahena at the Prudential Center in Newark, NJ with Bahena going down in round 5 that solidfied Davis' win by technical knockout.

programme.title: Leon Spinks vs Muhammad Ali 1
programme.desc: On February 15th, 1978 Leon Spinks fought Muhammad Ali for WBA & WBC World Heavyweight titles although Spinks defeated Ali he was stripped of the WBC title as he chose to fight The Greatest, Muhammad Ali instead of the #1 contender Ken Norton.

programme.title: Lloyd Honeyghan vs Donald Curry
programme.desc: On September 27th, 1986 Lloyd Honeyghan faced Donald Curry for the IBF, WBA and WBC World Welterweight title at the Caesars Palace in Atlantic City in a 15 round bout that ended in the sixth giving Honeyghan the win.

programme.title: Luis Alberto Lopez vs Gabe Flores
programme.desc: On September 10th, 2021, Luis Alberto Lopez fought Gabe Flores in a super featherweight bout in Tucson. In a surprising upset, Lopez won by a convincing unanimous decision.

programme.title: Manny Pacquaio vs Timothy Bradley II
programme.desc: On April 12th, 2014 Manny Pacquiao faced Timothy Bradley for the second time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the WBO World Welterweight title in a 12 round bout resulting in a victory for Pacquiao.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Chris Algieri
programme.desc: On November 23rd, 2014, Manny Pacquiao and Chris Algieri faced each other for the WBO Welterweight Title in Macao. Manny Pacquaio defeated Chris Algieri after knocking Algieri down six times and securing a unanimous decision.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs David Diaz
programme.desc: On June 28th, 2008 Manny Pacquiao and David Diaz fought eachother at Mandalay Bay Events Center in Las Vegas for the WBC World Lightweight titles with Diaz going down in the ninth round Pacquiao secured his victory.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Erik Morales 1
programme.desc: On March 19th, 2005, Erik Morales fought Manny Pacquiao for the WBC and IBA Super Featherweight Titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. In a great fight that went the distance, Morales got the best of Pacquiao who seemed to have an off-night.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Jeff Horn
programme.desc: On July 2nd, 2017 Manny Pacquiao battled Jeff Horn for the WBO World Welterweight title at the Suncorp Stadium in Brisbane in a 12 round bout that ended in a victory for Horn.

programme.title: Manny Pacquiao vs Juan Manuel Marquez 1
programme.desc: Manny Pacquiao and Juan Manuel Marquez fought their first match in 2004, resulting in a controversial draw. Both fighters displayed incredible skill, but no clear winner emerged setting the stage for their epic rivarly.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: New faces are welcomed to the fraternity of men known as Ax Men. Rygaard and Conner Aviation hope their new greenhorns fare better than the last class. At Pihl, a missing cutter sends the crew on a search mission.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: The gap between winners and losers is narrowing. Rygaard's new greenhorn battles to prove himself, while Conner Aviation's substitute pilot gets wild with the chopper. Dwayne Dethlefs leaves Pihl Logging high and dry.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: The final week of logging's toughest season begins. Impossible goals leave no room for error, as each crew races the clock. While Rygaard and Browning are locked in a fight to the finish, Conner Aviation battles for survival.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: As the logging season winds to a close, the drama heats up. Conner fights off defeat, while the men of Pihl fight each other. Jimmy's barge refuses to budge, and for Browning and Rygaard, eleventh-hour catastrophes send the competition down to the wire.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie and Jase argue over an old GI Joe toy, it leads them into a debate over who would make a better soldier. To settle the score, Willie and Jase head out to the woods with their friends and children for a paintball match.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie gets a soft serve machine for himself, he tells the guys they can't use it until they're done working. But when Jase thinks this is unfair, he takes matters into his own hands and finds a better object to use as motivation.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Jase finds out Jep is planning to buy his kids a fancy playhouse from a catalog, he and the guys decide to build one for Jep them selves. But when the playhouse ends up looking more like a military-style duck blind.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Sadie spends the day at Duck Commander for a school project, the guys try to show her the ins-and-outs of how a successful company works. But when Willie questions Jase's ingenuity in creating new products they get into a debate.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: The Robertson family pulls together a family reunion to give Mia a big send-off before her surgery.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When the Governor of Louisiana announces that he will be coming to Duck Commander to present Willie with a commerce award, John Luke volunteers to give the introduction speech.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: With Reed's graduation day approaching, Jase decides to take Reed frog hunting the night before, like he did on the day of his own graduation. Willie and Si join in, and Jase tries to keep them from imparting their "college advice" on Reed.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When Willie agrees to sponsor Mountain Man's radio contest, a "Hands on a Hardbody" competition, he somehow finds himself competing against Si for Mountain Man's last minute prize: a woodchipper.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
programme.desc: When the Robertsons participate in the West Monroe Fire Department pancake breakfast, the firemen invite Willie and his brothers to train with the department for the day. Meanwhile, Phil and Si accompany Miss Kay on a trip to visit a family grave.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: In Alaska, the clock is ticking on the Dalton as the deadline to deliver a massive oil rig pushes every driver to step it up to get the job done.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The biggest storm of the season hits the Haul Road. A trailer malfunction leaves Jack Jessee in danger of getting stranded as the brutal weather closes in.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: With the Dalton shut down, every haul road driver fights to make their delivery as the DOT scrambles to reopen the road.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: It's time for drivers to step up or step out of the game. With tension on the road at the breaking point, one driver will walk away. Austin is tasked with the biggest load of the season so far.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: On Manitoba's Winter Roads, Hugh Rowland and Rick Yemm's season is already on the brink of disaster. But Rick makes a deadly discovery about his truck that puts the rest of his season, and his life, in jeopardy.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Grimlock seems to turn against his friends, but the change of heart proves to have been caused by a miniature Decepticon taking control of his body and mind.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Strongarm takes on her first “solo” mission—tracking the insane frog-like Decepticon SPRINGLOAD to the ruins of an ancient temple.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: The Bee Team welcomes visiting Autobot veteran JAZZ, just in time to fend off the massive Bot-worm PED – a petty crook bent on monopolizing Energon supplies.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Infected by a Decepticon’s toxin, Bumblebee regresses to the maturity of a youngster, leaving the team essentially leaderless, chasing an escaped fugitive, and trying to keep tabs on the hyperactive lieutenant.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: The Bee team finds itself caught in the middle of a feud between rival bounty hunters, who are both out to claim a bounty on Bumblebee.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Bee tries to keep his team from distraction as they fight MALODOR and his Skunkticon posse, while Optimus, in the realm of the Primes, undergoes a dangerous test administered by MICRONUS.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Sideswipe blackmails Strongarm into doing all his work while the team tries to capture crab-like CLAMPDOWN, jailed for the very same crime back on Cybertron, before he can join Steeljaw’s Pack.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Denny and the Bots are captured by the bat-Decepticon NIGHTSTRIKE, who plunges the team members into their worst fears.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Mad-scientist VERTEBREAK captures Sideswipe, steals his body and stores the Autobot’s head in a jar, leaving Sideswipe to think he’s unable to contribute to the team.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: After a dispute with his sensei, Drift, Jetstorm returns to Earth in the hopes of studying at the feet of a new master – Russell!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Bee and the Team head to the ocean floor to capture Decepticon OCTOPUNCH, not knowing that Grimlock is covering up a serious injury.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: An attempt to fix the ailing Fixit goes horribly wrong, turning the Mini-Con into a fully weaponized and lethal prison guard who mistakes the Bee Team for Decepticon fugitives.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: After Steeljaw and his Pack commandeer the Scrapyard and its defense while the Bee Team is away, our heroes must find a way back in – or face an army of freed Decepticon prisoners.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: When Dinobot Scowl goes on a rampage, Grimlock briefly ponders a return to old habits, but comes to terms with the fact that not all Dinobots are good-guys.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: The Bee Team allies with Windblade, another Decepticon-hunting Autobot, to take on Zizza, a mind-controlling queen-bee-'Con who has taken control of a small airport.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: An educational trip turns into a Decepticon hunt as Bee and the Bots stumble upon the shape-shifter Pseudo in a western ghost town.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: As Optimus prepares to return to Earth to face the mysterious Great Evil he's prophesied to Bumblebee, the Bee Team tries to prevent Steeljaw's Pack from teleporting that very threat, the First Decepticon, Megatronus, back into Earth's dimension.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Reunited with Optimus Prime, Bee, and his team must use everything they’ve learned together to stop Megatronus from annihilating Earth and Cybertron in one fell swoop.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: The Autobots split into two teams, one facing an old foe of Bumblebee's and the other a Decepticon in the polar wastes.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: With an old score to settle, Bumblebee insists on taking on OVERLOAD alone, while a weakened Optimus must learn to contribute in ways others than combat if his team is to bring down POLARCLAW.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: As Steeljaw learns of a community of Decepticons in a surprising location, Grimlock and Strongarm struggle to improve their teamwork as, together with Bumblebee, they face SABERHORN.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: After a mistake in the field, Strongarm takes herself out of action just when the team needs her most against fire-­‐starting Decepticons CRAZYBOLT and SLICEDICE.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Windblade's concern for Optimus' wellbeing may spell doom for the entire Away Team when they run up against a sly hunter of a Decepticon named RAZORPAW.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Grimlock forgets how to fight when, in an effort to become smarter, he downloads a huge amount of data into his brain and overwrites his combat instincts.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: More hints about Decepticon Island are revealed when Steeljaw invades the Scrapyard with a clever plan, and Bumblebee, Grimlock and Strongarm confront SCORPONOK, one of the Island's leaders.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: After being coaxed into going to a concert given by his favorite band, Bumblebee hopes for a quiet evening away from the Scrapyard, but finds action and danger when BISK attacks the arena.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Grimlock's quest for an effective disguise goes into overdrive when QUILLFIRE returns and Bumblebee and Strongarm find themselves stuck in an impound lot.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Fixit's efforts to repair the GroundBridge go horribly awry, instead summoning two of the most legendary and fearsome Decepticons to the Scrapyard – and banishing Bumblebee to another dimension.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Trying to show how effective they are without their teacher's direction, Slipstorm and Jetstorm inadvertently put Drift in harm's way and must come to their master's aid before he is destroyed by STOCKADE.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: With the Bee Team and the Away Team reunited, the Autobots, joined by an old friend, locate and investigate Decepticon Island, and unexpectedly find Steeljaw in charge of an army of Decepticons!

programme.title: Transformers: Robots in Disguise
programme.desc: Badly outnumbered and trapped on Decepticon Island, the Autobots desperately search for a way to take out Steeljaw and put his army of fugitives in stasis, but friction between Bumblebee and Optimus could put the mission – and all of Earth – at risk!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! 5D's
